implementation_summary: Created leaveSync.ts as a pure-function module (zero React, zero IDB, zero context imports) exporting LEAVE_INTENT_KIND=13, LeaveIntentPayload interface, serialiseLeaveIntent, and parseLeaveIntent. serialiseLeaveIntent explicitly destructures only pubkey to prevent extra fields leaking into the wire format. parseLeaveIntent guards typeof parsed.pubkey !== 'string' inside a try/catch, covering invalid JSON, missing field, non-string pubkey, and JSON null. Test file mirrors pollSync.test.ts structure with 9 cases covering the three AC-SYNC-4 required assertions plus edge cases.
